summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AAPL Bear 1X ETF (AAPD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Apple stock. AAPD was launched on Aug 9, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

holdings.infoBox: AAPD is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 70.88%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 23.77%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 5.12%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 5.05%, and Cash at -0.00%.
